It provides businesses with fast, accurate insights by transforming raw data into structured workflows for various functions such as product management, marketing, customer service, and RevOps. Key features include real-time dashboards, customizable reporting templates, automated alerts for key issues, and the ability to identify at-risk customers and improve product performance. Strive aims to enhance strategic decision-making by delivering reliable insights quickly and efficiently.

Title: CTO & Co-founder
Description: Mutiny is an AI-powered tool designed for customer-facing work, specifically in sales and marketing teams. It automates tasks such as account research, follow-ups, and project management through features like personalized landing pages, integrated playbooks, and multi-channel campaigns. The platform simplifies collaboration by allowing team members to focus on important activities while providing tools for managing client interactions, generating quality output, and improving overall efficiency in sales processes.

Title: Chief Technology Officer
Description: marGo is a cloud-based CRM and marketing automation platform designed specifically for direct sellers, sales consultants, and corporate marketers. It automates contact management, lead generation, and customer engagement through features like AI-powered recommendations, automated follow-ups, and real-time analytics. Users can manage contacts, host events, run multichannel marketing campaigns, and access data insights to make informed decisions. The platform also offers tools for creating personalized content, managing social media interactions, and streamlining business operations.

Title: CEO/CTO/Co-Founder
Description: Abmatic AI offers a platform called Clara, designed to enhance account-based marketing (ABM) campaigns through automation and intent data. The platform automates web personalization, outbound advertising, display ads, and LinkedIn Ads across platforms like Google and Meta, while also providing tools for tracking ROI and generating custom reports and dashboards to optimize marketing efforts. Key features include automated email sequencing, real-time audience segmentation, and integration with existing systems to streamline operations and improve efficiency in demand generation and advertising performance.

Title: Co-Founder, Chief Technology Officer
Description: Stiddle is a customer intelligence platform designed for Google My Business (GTM) teams to enhance visibility and understanding of customer journeys. It connects various data sources, including website visitors, leads, and customers, through single-click integrations and AI-driven insights. Key features include identity resolution, conversion tracking, reporting dashboards, and the ability to segment audiences and track key performance metrics across multiple platforms. Stiddle aims to eliminate issues associated with cookie collection and improve overall customer engagement.

Title: Chief Technology Officer
Description: DecisionLinks offers a platform that helps marketing agencies, automotive marketers, and lenders create custom audiences through data integration. The platform provides access to a vast repository of consumer data, including VINs and MAID information, allowing users to manage campaigns across various channels. Key features include real-time analytics for campaign performance, customizable audience targeting, and FCRA compliance solutions for pre-screen credit marketing. The service aims to enhance marketing strategies and improve overall effectiveness through reliable data management.

Title: Chief Technology Officer
Description: Experiture is an omnichannel marketing platform designed to enhance customer engagement through personalized messaging and real-time data analysis. It consolidates customer data, automates marketing campaigns across various channels such as email, SMS, direct mail, and mobile apps, while also providing predictive analytics for audience segmentation and campaign management. Key features include the ability to create tailored content, manage email campaigns efficiently, and utilize AI-powered tools like QR codes and call tracking to optimize interactions and improve conversion rates.

Title: Chief Technology Officer
Description: Meaningly offers AI-powered content annotation, ad measurement, and audience segmentation solutions for publishers, media companies, and advertising marketplaces. Its main functionality includes contextualizing and optimizing content across various formats through a Taxonomy Engine, as well as improving ad targeting by testing creative performance without testing. Key features include an audience builder for interest-based audience segmenting, predictive brand lift strategies, and tools to enhance the return on investment (ROI) from existing content.

Title: Co-Founder & CTO
Description: Cordial is a cross-channel marketing platform designed to enhance customer engagement and drive revenue through real-time messaging. Key features include predictive intent analysis, automated message generation, identity resolution, and journey orchestration, allowing businesses to tailor their marketing strategies based on user behavior and preferences.

Title: Chief Technology Officer

Title: Chief Technology Officer (CTO)

Title: CTO Eyeonim B.V. | Senior software engineer

Title: Cto
Description: Rival Technologies offers a conversational research platform designed to enhance consumer insights for businesses. Title: Founder / Chief Technology Officer
Description: AgencyAnalytics is a platform designed for marketing agencies to streamline client reporting and communication. It automates the creation of reports by utilizing AI to identify trends, hidden opportunities, and detect issues quickly. Key features include customizable report templates for various marketing campaigns, automated performance alerts, and 24/7 client access through a dedicated portal, allowing agencies to manage client interactions and monitor campaign performance in one centralized location. The platform aims to save time and reduce non-billable costs while enhancing client engagement and understanding of workflows.

Title: Co-Founder & CTO
Description: Techminds is a technology services provider that offers a range of solutions to enhance business operations and efficiency across various industries, including manufacturing, logistics, retail, and food and beverage. Their main functionalities include ERP systems, cloud migration, managed database services, AI consulting, digital marketing, and cybersecurity. Key features include real-time data analytics, automated inventory management, and tailored IT support to improve operational performance and drive growth for businesses in sectors like agriculture, healthcare, and retail.

Title: Chief Technology Officer
Description: Flow is an AI-powered operations platform designed for manufacturer sales firms and their clients. It offers features such as rapid quoting, automated data entry, email campaigns, pricing tracking, and business analytics to streamline communication and management within the manufacturing industry. The platform aims to enhance productivity and efficiency by reducing manual tasks and improving overall sales performance.

Title: Chief Technology Officer
Description: Userflow is an AI-powered platform designed to enhance product adoption and onboarding for SaaS teams. The platform also offers customizable in-app experiences such as product tours, surveys, and banners to help users navigate their journey towards product success.

Title: Cofounder , Cto

The platform aims to improve revenue by continuously optimizing email engagement and converting lost shoppers into buyers.

Title: Chief Technology Officer
Description: LeadNitro is an AI-driven sales automation platform designed for B2B teams.
